title: Desktop background not updating after policy change
description: User reports that the desktop background has not updated following a recent company-wide policy change. Device has been restarted once with no visible change. No functional impact reported.

title: External emails remain in Outbox
description: User is able to send internal emails successfully, but emails addressed to external recipients remain stuck in the Outbox. Issue began approximately 09:00 today. General internet connectivity confirmed working.

title: Printer not found on second floor
description: User cannot see the second floor network printer in the list of available devices. Other users on the same floor are unaffected. No recent changes to the device reported.
notes: Checked print spooler service, running normally.

title: VPN connection drops after 10 minutes
description: User reports that the VPN disconnects automatically after approximately 10 minutes of use. Reconnecting manually works but the issue repeats. Affects working from home only.
